name: Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori ORIX HOTELS & RESORTS
address: 160Tougenndai Motohakone, Hồ Ashi, Hakone, Nhật Bản
description:
Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori: Nơi lưu giữ kỷ niệm đáng nhớ tại Hakone, Nhật Bản

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori là một khách sạn 4.0 sao nằm tại vùng Hakone, Nhật Bản. Với 154 phòng, khách sạn này mang đến không gian thoải mái và tiện nghi cho du khách. Với vị trí thuận lợi, chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố 18.5 km, khách sạn cũng nằm gần sân bay, chỉ mất khoảng 120 phút để đến sân bay. Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori được xây dựng vào năm 2017 và có thời gian nhận phòng từ 03:00 PM và trả phòng trước 10:00 AM. Đặc biệt, khách sạn này cho phép trẻ em từ 0 đến 0 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori là một khách sạn tuyệt vời tại Hakone, Nhật Bản với nhiều tiện nghi giải trí đáng chú ý. Du khách có thể tìm thấy nhiều cửa hàng tại đây, nơi bạn có thể mua sắm các sản phẩm độc đáo và đặc sản địa phương. Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và thả lỏng cơ thể, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ mát-xa chuyên nghiệp và phòng xông hơi. Bạn cũng có thể tận hưởng không gian yên tĩnh và tươi mát tại khu vườn xanh mát của khách sạn.

Các tiện nghi thể thao tại Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori là một khách sạn tuyệt vời tọa lạc tại Hakone, Nhật Bản, và nơi đây cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi thể thao tuyệt vời cho du khách. Một trong những tiện ích nổi bật là hồ bơi ngoài trời. Với không gian rộng rãi và thiết kế đẹp mắt, hồ bơi là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng những ngày nắng. Du khách có thể thả mình trong nước mát lạnh, tắm nắng trên ghế nằm thoải mái hoặc tận hưởng một ly cocktail tuyệt vời tại quầy bar bên bể bơi.

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori tọa lạc tại Hakone, Nhật Bản, và cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi tiện lợi để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách hàng. Khách sạn có Wi-Fi miễn phí trong các khu vực công cộng và trong tất cả các phòng, giúp du khách kết nối với thế giới bên ngoài dễ dàng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có khu vực cấm hút thuốc riêng biệt, đảm bảo không gian trong lành cho những khách hàng không hút thuốc. 

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori cũng cung cấp dịch vụ lưu trữ hành lý, giúp khách hàng thoải mái khám phá vùng đất mới mà không phải lo lắng về hành lý của mình. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có máy bán hàng tự động, giúp khách hàng tiện lợi mua sắm các đồ uống và đồ ăn nhẹ mà không cần ra khỏi khách sạn. Đội ngũ nhân viên khách sạn cũng thực hiện dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày, đảm bảo rằng không gian nghỉ ngơi của khách hàng luôn sạch sẽ và thoải mái. 

Với những tiện nghi tiện lợi này, Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori là sự lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những du khách mong muốn có trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện nghi tại Hakone, Nhật Bản.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori ở Hakone, Nhật Bản, cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển thuận tiện cho khách du lịch. Khách sẽ không phải lo lắng về vấn đề đỗ xe vì khách sạn có bãi đỗ xe riêng. Bãi đỗ xe miễn phí và nằm ngay tại khách sạn, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và tiền bạc. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ xe đưa đón, giúp du khách di chuyển dễ dàng và thoải mái trong quá trình khám phá thành phố.

Những tiện nghi ẩm thực tuyệt vời tại Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori không chỉ là một khách sạn tuyệt vời để nghỉ ngơi, mà còn mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm ẩm thực đáng nhớ. Với nhà hàng tại khách sạn, bạn sẽ được thưởng thức những món ăn tuyệt hảo từ các đầu bếp tài ba. Không chỉ có những món ăn truyền thống Nhật Bản, nhà hàng còn phục vụ các món ăn quốc tế đa dạng, đảm bảo đáp ứng được mọi khẩu vị khác nhau. Bạn có thể tận hưởng bữa sáng tự chọn tại nhà hàng, với một bữa buffet đầy đủ các món ngon và hấp dẫn.

Phòng khách sạn Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori - Lựa chọn phong phú

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori tọa lạc tại Hakone, Nhật Bản, và cung cấp một loạt các loại phòng đáng chú ý. Những phòng tiêu chuẩn không hút thuốc rộng 23 mét vuông với 2 giường đơn sẽ mang lại cho bạn không gian thoải mái và thoáng đãng. Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm thêm một chút thư giãn, phòng tiêu chuẩn Twin với bồn tắm ngoài trời cũng là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Với diện tích 23 mét vuông và 2 giường đơn, bạn có thể tận hưởng cảm giác thư thái sau một ngày dạo chơi. Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm sự sang trọng hơn, phòng Deluxe Lake Side Japanese Western Style với bồn tắm ngoài trời rộng 47 mét vuông và 2 giường đơn sẽ là sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo.

Hakone - Thiên đường nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại Hakone, Nhật Bản

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori tọa lạc tại Hakone, Nhật Bản - một điểm đến nổi tiếng với cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp và nhiều hoạt động thú vị. Với vị trí tuyệt vời, khách sạn nằm ngay bên hồ Ashinoko, cho phép du khách tận hưởng khung cảnh hùng vĩ của núi Phú Sỹ và hồ xanh trong lành. 

Hakone không chỉ nổi tiếng với cảnh quan thiên nhiên đẹp mắt, mà còn có nhiều điểm tham quan độc đáo. Du khách có thể tham gia vào một chuyến du thuyền trên hồ Ashinoko, khám phá các ngôi đền và lâu đài cổ xưa, hay tận hưởng những bữa ăn ngon tại các nhà hàng truyền thống. Ngoài ra, khu vực này cũng có nhiều suối nước nóng tự nhiên, nơi du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng những liệu pháp spa truyền thống Nhật Bản.

Cách di chuyển từ sân bay gần Hakone đến Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Để đến Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori ở Hakone, Nhật Bản từ sân bay gần nhất, bạn có một số lựa chọn vận chuyển thuận tiện và dễ dàng. Sân bay gần nhất là Sân bay quốc tế Tokyo Haneda (HND), cách Hakone khoảng 90 km. Từ sân bay này, bạn có thể di chuyển bằng xe buýt hoặc tàu điện ngầm đến ga Odawara, một trong những ga gần Hakone. Từ ga Odawara, bạn có thể chọn tiếp tục đi bằng tàu hoặc xe buýt để đến Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori.

Nếu bạn muốn tiết kiệm thời gian và muốn di chuyển trực tiếp từ sân bay đến Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori, bạn có thể thuê xe hoặc sử dụng dịch vụ taxi. Điều này sẽ giúp bạn tiết kiệm thời gian và thoải mái khám phá vùng đất đẹp này. Tuy nhiên, hãy nhớ kiểm tra thông tin về giá cước và lộ trình trước khi đi để tránh bất tiện và tránh tình trạng kẹt xe.

Khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng gần Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori có vị trí thuận lợi gần nhiều địa danh nổi tiếng, mang đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời. Một trong số đó là Bảo tàng Ngoài trời Hakone, nằm cách khách sạn chỉ vài bước chân. Đây là nơi trưng bày nhiều tác phẩm nghệ thuật ngoài trời độc đáo, tạo nên một không gian tuyệt đẹp và sáng tạo. 

Nếu bạn muốn ngắm toàn cảnh thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp của Hakone, hãy trải qua chuyến đi bằng cáp treo Hakone. Điểm dừng chân tiếp theo sẽ là Ōwakudani, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức những món ăn đặc sản độc đáo và chiêm ngưỡng cảnh quan núi lửa đặc biệt. 

Bên cạnh đó, Hakone Shrine / Kuzuryu Shrine Singu cũng là một điểm đến hấp dẫn, nằm trong khu vực gần khách sạn. Điện thờ Hakone là một ngôi đền linh thiêng, nổi tiếng với kiến trúc truyền thống và cảnh quan xanh mát. Khách sạn cũng cách Bảo tàng thủy tinh Venetian và Bảo tàng nghệ thuật Pola chỉ trong khoảng cách đi bộ ngắn, cho phép du khách khám phá những tác phẩm nghệ thuật độc đáo và tận hưởng không gian tuyệt đẹp.

Các trạm giao thông công cộng xung quanh Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori nằm gần nhiều trạm giao thông công cộng tiện lợi. Trạm Smino (cáp treo Hakone Tozan Koen) chỉ cách khách sạn một quãng đi bộ ngắn, là điểm xuất phát lý tưởng để khám phá vẻ đẹp tự nhiên của khu vực. Khách cũng có thể dễ dàng tiếp cận Trạm xe buýt Ashinoyu và Trạm xe buýt Shinanok, nơi có nhiều tuyến đường kết nối với các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng trong thành phố. Nếu muốn khám phá xa hơn, du khách có thể đi tới Nhà ga Miyanoshita và Ubako Onsen Iriguchi Bus Station, nơi có nhiều tuyến xe buýt đi đến các địa điểm du lịch khác trong vùng.

Nhà hàng xung quanh Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori được bao quanh bởi nhiều nhà hàng tuyệt vời. Bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn đặc sản Nhật Bản tại Yamagusuri, Tamura Ginkatsu-tei và 808 Monsmare. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức mì soba truyền thống, hãy ghé qua Hatsuhana Soba Honten. Yubadon Naokichi và Kinosuke cũng là những địa điểm tuyệt vời để bạn thưởng thức ẩm thực độc đáo. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức gyoza ngon lành, hãy đến Gyoza Center. Bên cạnh đó, bạn cũng có thể tận hưởng không gian thoải mái và thưởng thức đồ uống tại HAKONE TENT Bar và Salon de thé Rosage. Với những lựa chọn đa dạng như vậy, bạn sẽ không bao giờ thiếu các nhà hàng tuyệt vời để khám phá trong khu vực xung quanh Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori.

Tham quan các điểm mua sắm xung quanh Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori nằm gần nhiều điểm mua sắm thú vị. Bạn có thể ghé qua Hakone Yosegi-zaiku Kiro để khám phá những sản phẩm thủ công độc đáo từ gỗ. Nếu bạn yêu thích hoa, hãy đến Nanohana, một cửa hàng hoa tươi với nhiều loại hoa đẹp mắt. Bạn cũng có thể thăm Sekisho Karakuri Museum để tìm hiểu về lịch sử và văn hóa đặc trưng của Hakone. Nếu bạn muốn mua các sản phẩm gốm sứ tuyệt đẹp, hãy đến Ginkatsu-kobo. Tanakaya Miyageten là một cửa hàng nổi tiếng với các sản phẩm thủ công truyền thống. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức trà truyền thống, hãy ghé qua Shiino Chaya Honjin Hotoriya. Hatajuku Yosegi Kaikan là nơi bạn có thể tìm hiểu về nghệ thuật Yosegi-zaiku. Bạn cũng có thể mua các sản phẩm truyền thống tại Hamamatsuya và Takeichi. Cuối cùng, nếu bạn là fan của bộ truyện Eva, hãy ghé qua Eva Store để tìm hiểu về những sản phẩm liên quan đến bộ truyện này.

Giá trung bình của phòng tại Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori so sánh với giá trung bình của phòng ở cùng thành phố

Với giá trung bình của một phòng tại Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori là $368, đây là một sự lựa chọn đáng xem xét cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại Hakone. So với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại Hakone là $300, Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori có mức giá cao hơn một chút. Tuy nhiên, với sự đẳng cấp và tiện ích tuyệt vời mà nơi này mang lại, đây là một sự đầu tư đáng giá.

Khách sạn Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori - Những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng

Khách sạn Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm không gian thư giãn và thân thiện. Nhân viên rất thân thiện và nói tiếng Anh tốt. Đây là một nơi rất đẹp, mang đến cảm giác thư thái và tôi rất thích không khí ở đây. Dịch vụ tốt, bữa ăn tuyệt vời. Tôi cũng thích phòng và bữa tối tự chọn rất ngon. Đồ ăn ngon và đa dạng. Nhân viên thân thiện và tiếng Anh của họ rất tốt. Đội ngũ nhân viên rất tôn trọng và hữu ích. Rất tốt, rất đáng giới thiệu. Phòng sạch sẽ và được tổ chức tốt với bồn tắm ngoài trời nhìn ra hồ Ashi tuyệt đẹp. Tổng thể là một khách sạn rất tuyệt vời, rất đáng giới thiệu.

Khách hàng đánh giá tích cực về Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Hakone, Nhật Bản. Với điểm đánh giá tổng thể là 9.0, khách hàng đã thể hiện sự hài lòng với trải nghiệm của họ tại khách sạn này. Khách hàng đánh giá cao sự đáng giá với điểm 8.5, cho thấy rằng giá cả phù hợp với chất lượng dịch vụ và tiện nghi tại đây.

Khách sạn Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori cũng được đánh giá cao với điểm 9.1 cho tiện nghi. Với các tiện ích hiện đại và chất lượng, khách hàng đã có những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại đây. Điểm 9.4 cho sự sạch sẽ cũng là một yếu tố thu hút du khách. Khách sạn Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori luôn được duy trì vệ sinh và sạch sẽ, mang lại cảm giác thoải mái và yên tĩnh cho khách hàng.

Vị trí của khách sạn cũng nhận được đánh giá tích cực, với điểm 8.9. Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori cho phép du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Đội ngũ nhân viên cũng được khách hàng đánh giá cao, với điểm 9.2 cho hiệu suất làm việc của họ. Với sự nhiệt tình và chuyên nghiệp, nhân viên sẽ đảm bảo du khách có một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại khách sạn Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori.

sample_comments.text: Có một khách sạn nghỉ dưỡng tốt nhất để ngắm nhìn cảnh sắc tuyệt đẹp của hồ Ashi, chỉ mất chưa đến 5 phút đi bộ từ bến xe buýt hồ Ashi, giao thông rất thuận tiện! Việc nhận phòng cũng rất suôn sẻ, không có vấn đề gì. Các tiện nghi tắm chân tự hào có thể nhìn ra toàn cảnh hồ Ashi, giúp du khách dễ dàng thư giãn. Phòng rất rộng rãi và cũng rất sạch sẽ! Phòng/nhà hàng/khu vực chung có cảnh hồ tuyệt đẹp, bữa tối và bữa sáng đều theo hình thức buffet, có nhiều loại món ăn, khiến tôi rất hài lòng. Hơn nữa, đồ uống trong bữa tối cũng đã bao gồm trong chi phí bữa ăn tối, vì vậy không cần phí thêm, có thể thoải mái thưởng thức. Bên cạnh đó, về phần phòng tắm, bể tắm ngoài trời có thể ngâm mình và chiêm ngưỡng hồ Ashi, còn có hai loại xông hơi, giúp tôi tận hưởng trọn vẹn trong một lần lưu trú. Cảnh sắc cực kỳ tuyệt vời, món ăn cũng rất ngon, phòng tắm cũng tuyệt vời, tôi thật sự hy vọng có thể quay lại đây một lần nữa.
sample_comments.title: Du lịch gia đình
sample_comments.response: Thank you for staying at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori. We truly appreciate you for taking time to write such a detailed a valuable review. We are very delighted that you had a great stay with us and enjoyed everything we provided. Please note that our buffet menu and hotel view is changes with seasons. The next time you visit, we are sure that there will be fresh experiences waiting. We look forward to meeting you again! thank you very much for your kind comments and review.

sample_comments.positives: Amazing property, service and food. CanÂ¿t fault one thing during our stay. Just be warned that it takes a while to get there!!

sample_comments.text: The hotel is incredible, location, views, space, onsen. I'd repeat without thinking it!!!
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text:
Khách sạn nghỉ dưỡng tọa lạc chỉ cách trạm xe buýt Hồ Ashi 5 phút đi bộ, rất thuận tiện cho việc đi lại! Thủ tục nhận phòng cũng rất suôn sẻ không gặp bất kỳ vấn đề gì. Khu vực ngâm chân mà Hanaori tự hào cũng có thể nhìn xuống toàn cảnh Hồ Ashi, khiến tôi cảm thấy rất thoải mái.

Phòng cũng rất đẹp! Cả bữa tối và bữa sáng đều theo hình thức buffet, nhưng có rất nhiều món nên tôi rất hài lòng. Cà ri ở đây cực kỳ ngon. Ngoài ra, bữa tối tại khách sạn này có đồ uống có cồn bao gồm trong giá, vì vậy tôi có thể thoải mái thưởng thức mà không phải lo lắng về hóa đơn riêng.

Về bồn tắm, bồn tắm ngoài trời cho phép ngâm mình trong khi ngắm Hồ Ashi, và có 2 loại sauna, vì vậy tôi có thể tận hưởng cả hai trong một lần lưu trú!

Cảnh đẹp rất tuyệt vời, đồ ăn rất ngon, và bồn tắm cũng rất tốt. Tôi muốn quay lại đây một lần nữa. Xin cảm ơn!
sample_comments.title: Khu nghỉ dưỡng khách sạn tuyệt vời nhất để thưởng thức cảnh đẹp của hồ Ashi.

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text:
Thông thường, những dịch vụ như đồ uống rượu miễn phí trong bữa sáng và tối, ghế massage thường phải trả phí riêng nhưng ở đây lại được sử dụng miễn phí, thật tuyệt vời! 
Ngoài ra, sashimi cá ngừ và tôm ngọt cũng rất ngon, và có đủ loại món tráng miệng rất hấp dẫn! 
Thật không may, trời mưa nên cảnh quan không đẹp nhưng bồn tắm trong phòng cũng rất tốt. 
Tuy nhiên không rõ do trời mưa hay không, nhưng Wi-fi yếu, kết nối rất kém. Thêm vào đó, chỗ tắm rửa trong bồn tắm của phòng trơn trượt, tôi cảm thấy khá nguy hiểm, và khoảng cách từ phòng đến bồn tắm, nhà hàng khá xa!! Chỉ có ba điểm đó khiến tôi cảm thấy không hài lòng, nhưng tổng thể, chuyến đi đã rất thỏa mãn với suối nước nóng, bữa ăn và sự phục vụ của nhân viên! 
Tôi muốn trở lại đây lần nữa.
sample_comments.title: Nhiều dịch vụ miễn phí cũng thật tốt.
sample_comments.response: この度は、箱根・芦ノ湖 はなをりにご宿泊いただきまして誠にありがとうございます。貴重なお時間をいただき、、詳細にレビューを記載していただきましたこと重ねて御礼申し上げます。ご滞在中、ごゆっくりお過ごしいただけた様子が伺え私共も大変嬉しく存じます。箱根の名湯と芦ノ湖の雄大な眺望とのコラボレーションが望める温泉や、旬の食材を使用した料理を堪能していただけたら幸いでございます。当館のビュッフェのメニューは季節に応じて変わってまいりますので、次回のご来館もきっとお楽しみいただけるかと思います。またのご来館をスタッフ一同心よりお待ち申し上げております。ご投稿ありがとうございました。

sample_comments.text: Tôi đã đến Haneda, thuê xe và đi đến ryokan Hakone. Tôi đã đặt một phòng có bể tắm ngoài trời, và cơ sở vật chất trong phòng rất sạch sẽ và tốt. sample_comments.response: Thank you very much for staying at Hakone Ashinoko Hanamori. We are truly delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay. We are very grateful for your kind words. We will continue to strive to ensure our guests' satisfaction, without becoming complacent due to the praise we have received. Thank you for posting your review. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you again.

sample_comments.title: Bad location, facilities and service
sample_comments.text:
No direct bus to the hotel, hotel had free shuttle but only 3 times a day, and it was always fully booked. Hotel should have increased the frequency of shuttle or have a larger bus, given that it was really inconvenient to get to any other areas in Hakone. Our room was with open air bath and was a few blocks away from the reception. There were a few staff standing around but no one offered to help to transport our luggage to our room, we had to wheel our luggage across long corridors, up and down 2 elevators. The worst was that we discovered to our horror that the open air bath was only hot tap water, NOT HOT SPRING WATER!! That was never mention anywhere in the Agoda website!!! 
The dinner was good, restaurant staff were attentive. However, spread did not change much, so we had 3 nights of the same food, would be better if hotel could vary the spread more.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for your candid review of your recent stay. I am sadded to read that our service and facilities doesn't sastify of your expectation. Except the shuttle bus, there are also have local bus from Odawara station and highway bus from Shinjuku which is direct to our hotel. Furthermore, We are really sorry about that our staff haven't help you wheel your luggage to your room and haven't mention the open-air bath in the room is hot water on website. Your valuable advice will share to all of our staff and We hope to have pleasure to welcome you back to Hakone on your another vacation.
Yours Sincerely,
Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori reception
sample_comments.room_type: Japanese-Western Deluxe Room: Open-Air Bath, Non-Smoking

sample_comments.title: Beware!
sample_comments.positives: Horrible experience.
sample_comments.negatives:
I was very disappointed with my stay due to both the room and the check-in process.

I specifically booked a room with a balcony and a lake view based on the photos advertised. However, I was assigned Room 114 on the ground floor, far from the main areas, and the view was completely obstructed by trees. It did not resemble the advertised view at all. Even the receptionist acknowledged that the room did not have the same lake view I had expected.

When I asked to change rooms, I was told the hotel was fully booked. I then requested a partial discount since the room clearly did not match what was advertised, but this was denied on the basis that it was still considered a "standard room." Guests should be aware that some rooms---especially lower-level ones---may be priced the same but have significantly worse views and locations.

The location of the room was also extremely inconvenient. It required taking multiple elevators and felt very far removed from everything else on the property.

The check-in process was another major frustration. We arrived around 1:30 PM and were told our room was being cleaned and that check-in would be at 3 PM. That's understandable---but what was unusual is that no one was allowed into their room early, even if it became ready. Instead, guests were made to wait in a crowded lobby until exactly 3 PM, when staff began handing out keys all at once. (Pictures of check-in attached. Everyone arrived at different times yet we were all told to sit and wait until what felt like a group check in started)

The lobby became extremely packed and chaotic, feeling more like a group tour check-in than a typical hotel experience. It was surprising and poorly managed, especially since most hotels allow guests to check in individually as rooms become available.

Overall, between the misleading room expectations, lack of flexibility or compensation, and the disorganized check-in process, this was a frustrating start to our vacation.

sample_comments.title: Lack of guest service and unhygienic rooms
sample_comments.positives:
The breakfast and dinner had a lot of options and were good, do keep in mind that you have to make a reservation for each meal on the same day.
It was very helpful that the hotel organizes a shuttle bus to take you to and from the train station.
sample_comments.negatives:
Shortly after checking into room 420, we noticed a strong drain-like smell resembling a urine odor coming from the corner of the room. On the other side of the wall there's the shower. The area was also visibly dusty. When we reported it to the front desk, staff were not very cooperative and did not apologize. We were initially told our only options were to either downgrade our room or pay extra for an upgrade, despite the issue being the hotel's fault for selling a defective room.
After further discussion we were moved to another room, but unfortunately the second room also had major cleanliness problems. There were dozens of flies on the walls, ceiling, sink, and on the beds, and we even found a used bus ticket left on the floor from previous guests, suggesting the room had not been cleaned properly.
What made the experience especially disappointing was the lack of empathy and professionalism from staff throughout the situation. We understand that problems can occasionally happen in hotels, but the way this was handled was extremely poor.
This ended up being one of the worst hotel experiences we have had while traveling.

sample_comments.title: Good from far, far from good
sample_comments.text:
This hotel appears like it is going to be a magical relaxing oasis on first arrival, however it feels like a façade. They have shuttles running all day from the train station but no food or services at the hotel until after 3:00pm when you can check in. Early check in is not an option. We paid extra to have an open air bath in our room and while the open air bath was nice, the room backs onto an extremely busy and loud road with busses and trucks running day and night on it. Sitting on the balcony was not relaxing in the slightest, and you're looking at the hotel parking lot. None of this is mentioned when booking. There was black mould and hair throughout the bathroom, and you only get 1 towel (you cannot request more). To top things off, our sheets had holes everywhere and there was a used bloody bandaid in our bed upon arrival. 

The food? Don't get me started. IKEA food is gourmet compared to this. It truly was so foul and not fresh. The fish tasted so strongly and bad. There were about 1-2 dishes total for vegetarians (in 2025??). The breakfast was the same with no real drip coffee even. The rice tasted fishy too which was a first for Japan. There are some small eateries outside the hotel but with varying hours you can't rely on. We didn't eat from arriving on the hotel shutting at 12 until our dinner slot at 7:30. 

On top of this, we paid almost *** Canadian, only to see on the day of, our room had dropped to ***. We asked for some kind of price matching are we were denied. Seems unethical. 

Overall I'm truly unsure how this hotel has so many good reviews. I felt this was such a disappointing and expensive mistake, and I will not be referring anyone here.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for staying with us at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori.

We sincerely apologize for not meeting your expectations during your stay. Please note that additional bath towels can be delivered to your room upon request. While waiting for your room to be prepared, guests may enjoy beer, gelato, and snacks available for purchase in our lounge and shop. There are also several nearby restaurants where you can enjoy lunch.

We are truly sorry for the discomfort caused by the bathroom, bed, and other inconveniences you experienced. We take your feedback seriously and will use it to improve the areas you mentioned. We deeply regret the issues that affected your stay, and we genuinely hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a much more comfortable experience on your next visit to Hakone.

Rest assured that your feedback will be shared with our entire staff and management team, and we will continue working diligently to ensure a pleasant stay for all our guests.

Thank you

sample_comments.title: Hotel switched two rooms of our party and refused to help the group that paid for a larger room with a view, then refuse
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful hotel and views
sample_comments.negatives:
TLDR: A nice hotel that falls short in a few ways compared to what is presented/promised at time of booking, including putting people into a lesser room than what they prepaid for and then refusing to assist with some sort of refund after the fact. I would recommend considering other onsen hotels in the area.

Full Review: This is a beautiful hotel but it has some problems. The very crowded buffet is the opposite of relaxing, which an onsen hotel in a resort town should be. The buffet food is very average, nothing special. The process of getting food is chaotic and the restaurant is very, very crowded and loud. Probably because it is full of foreigners. I am one myself, but I know how to dine politely in a polite country like Japan. That said, the onsen itself is very good and relaxing. But I'm not sure that offsets the dining experience.

Second, check in was chaotic. When several people got off the shuttle bus from the train station, we were first in line. We were directed to the check in kiosks, which could not find our reservations. We then had to get in the back of the line to check in at the lobby desk. By the way, I did not see the check in kiosk work for anyone while I was there.

That would not have been so bad, but then the three separate reservations made on booking.com by our group somehow got linked. We did not all reserve the same room type and the hotel switched two of the rooms and put people in a room type they did not pay for. This is inexcusable and I don't understand why the hotel could not figure out who should be in what room. Probably because check in was very chaotic overall.

Because we had a long trip with many hotels, it was not apparent to us at the time that the switch was made. But after reviewing their booking.com reservations, the group that was put in the lower priced, smaller room overlooking the parking lot realized they did not get what they paid for (a higher priced, larger room with a view of the lake).

sample_comments.title: Poor lakeview room
sample_comments.text:
This is to bring to the kind attention that we are extremely disappointed with the room you provided. To celebrate our wedding anniversary, we visited Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori from 5 Dec to 6 Dec 2022. During our stay, we encountered a number of disappointing service level that I think you should know and hopefully do something about it. The thing is we had confirmed the reservation of the most luxurious room of Lakeside Japanese and Western deluxe room with most expensive price compared with your other room offer. However, when we entered to the room, the view of lakeside is totally different to what you showed in your website. We thought willing to pay out more money would get an equal reward of service. The room is totally bad even compared with other room type in lower price. I wonder what is your differentiation policy of the offer of room type at your hotel for the client who is willing to pay more to get the superior quality of service. In fact, the room you offered shall be deemed as second-class room and it should be properly classified in your website.

I am writing to encourage you to improve your room type differentiation as I don't want this experience to ruin my positive impression about your hotel group. I just hope that these problems will be solved prior to my next visit.

Sincerely
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for taking your time to sending us your honest review.
We understand that your experience with us doesn't match with your expectation.
Our hotel has many types of room, among those are the Lake Side Standard Room. This room is indeed the best room for those who prioritize view of The Lake Ashi.
The Deluxe Room with Open-Air Bath are located where there are some trees on the outside. Mainly functioned as façade for guests who use the open-air bath. Thus, the lake can't be seen as straightforward as from Standard Room.
Furthermore, for those who wish to make sure they got the best view, we also have a View Promised Plan (limited to our official website).
Your concern and feedback are very much appreciated. We will keep in mind to give a better explanation of each room types prior to arrival so that there's no more unmet expectation in the future.
Sincerely,
Hotel Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori

sample_comments.title: An Overrated Onsen Hotel
sample_comments.text:
This establishment, despite its alluring façade and picturesque surroundings, ultimately fails to deliver a truly exceptional experience. Patrons may be drawn in by the promise of luxurious amenities and serene vistas; however, the reality often contradicts these expectations. 

First and foremost, both the buffet dinner and breakfast offerings are disappointingly limited, lacking the variety one would anticipate, while the quality of the cuisine leaves much to be desired, undermining the overall dining experience.

Moreover, the onsen experience itself does not fulfill its promise, characterized by mediocre facilities that fall short of the standard set by more esteemed establishments, compounded by notably small bathing areas that detract from the sense of relaxation and luxury..

While the hotel's location offers breathtaking scenery, the overall value fails to align with the hyperbolic acclaim surrounding this venue, rendering it an overrated choice for travelers seeking a true onsen experience.

sample_comments.text:
The environment is good, the room and environment are clean, it feels like a hot spring experience, and the bathrobe experience is provided. These are the advantages of the hotel.

However, the overall price/performance ratio is not high. I was looking forward to it after seeing the good reviews and recommendations of bloggers. Unexpectedly, the quality of the buffet not as high as expected; the hot springs are also only open at certain times; also, on the day of check-out, I felt incomplete about the whole trip to Hakone. It snowed early this morning. I thought it was a symbol of luck, due to the heavy snow, all the transportations back to the city/Odawara were stopped, it is extremely inconvenient for passengers travelling by transportation though there are 3 designated shuttle per day. I believe it is not the first time all the transportations were being stopped . I hope that the hotel will have plan for guests return to the city in heavy snow.

I will occasionally indulge myself on a 5* hotel so sadly, when this was priced like one for the Sakura season, I thought it would meet my standards. My expectations were unfortunately not met as the hotel just has too many people carted through from the buffet dinners/breakfasts and check-ins. So if you are wanting quiet and peace, this is not the hotel even though the nature outside has it. 
The rooms are clean and adequate. Half board is necessary since there is no other restaurants nearby and there is only one large self-service canteen at the hotel. There is no personal attention at all, and you have to retrieve your own toiletries from a communal section. Service is with a smile, but this establishment makes me think that I visited a farm factory just because it was so crowded. Missed the 5* personal touch and facilities but paid for one. They should really install some sound proofing in the large atrium as it gets too noisy during check-in. Literally the hotel attendant had to yell at me in order to tell her introduction.

We enjoyed Hanaori's breakfast and dinner very much. However, unfortunately, there was nothing to do on a rainy day: No gym, no karaoke, only TV in the room.

I was looking forward to a comfortable and convenient stay at ashinoko hanaoriI but unfortunately, our experience was marred by poor service and inconvenient facilities.

Firstly, the concierge service during check-in was subpar. We were rushing to meet our dinner reservations, but the staff seemed unbothered by our time constraint. When we asked for directions to the restaurant, the staff member who led us there displayed a poor attitude, failing to smile or greet us properly.

sample_comments.text: 如果想去大涌谷和坐盧之湖遊覽，呢間酒店就最方便，因為隔離就係盧之湖碼頭和纜車站(桃園站）步行三分鐘即達。溫泉同相片一樣咁靚，大堂有免費咖啡、凍飲提供，附近冇便利店和食店（碼頭有間餐廳，不過得好少選擇，亦唔知收幾點），二樓有幾部飲品機，可以自己比錢買，但零食要自己帶，因為附近真係乜都冇得賣，所以大家一定要訂早餐和晚餐。溫泉除咗基本洗頭沖涼用品外，仲有洗面、卸妝水、爽膚、潤膚品樣樣齊，連烝面機都有，女仕們亦可以在二樓自己挑選浴衣，真係一分錢一分貨，正。自助餐選擇不是太多，質素算ok. 房間舒適，浴室乾濕分離。最唔鍾意就係員工好冷漠，特別餐廳的員工，一點笑容都沒有，問我明天幾點吃早餐，我哋揀8:00，他指一指張紙，黑口黑面咁話，8:00 係繁忙時間，成間酒店的員工都欠缺笑容、欠主動，只有司機最友善。

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives:
The room was nice.
Comfy bed, pleasant private bath, the little details of the slippers complementary water, tea and shrimp cracks.
Shower was pleasant.
Really near by Togendai station.
The onsen is nice, interesting experience, good facility.
The decor and the views from the hotel are stunning.
sample_comments.negatives:
Half of the Ryokan is under construction so to get to my room and from it to the restaurant, vending machine, reception and onsen was at least a 5 minutes walk. That was very confusing and unpleasant.
Receptionist didn't speak very well English and wasn't trying their best to help, I'd even say somewhat aggressive. Even when I called reception from my room call got disconnected a few times and they didn't bother to call back.
Buffet food was okay, there was plenty but no dish stood out for me.
They don't allow tattoos in the onsen and charge you extra for cover stickers.
Remote control showed they have Netflix but they don't.
Don't expect to see Mount Fuji from hotel.
The hotel under achieved my expectations and I will not stay here again.
My private bath was facing the street and I felt there was no privacy as people walking by and can look.

sample_comments.title: Above average

sample_comments.title: Top architecture design let down by services that don't live up to the price charged
sample_comments.text:
Good
1. Design of the property is v good. The view at the lobby, the room are comfy
2. Location being next to Hakone rope way cable car & pirate ship docking bay making it convenient to get back to the hotel & ride the hotel bus to odawara station.
Bad
1. Services not up to the price charged. Over price by 30%
2. No potter service. Arrived at 1430. Hotel bus departed at 1330 & the next is at 1630 so we decided to take the public bus up. The ride is a far 60 min away. Once reached, we still have to push our own luggage up a hill all by ourselves. Even after checked in at the counter we still have to push the luggage to our rooms by ourselves 
2. Meal experience was mediocre at best. Buffett for dinner and breakfast. 
3. It was my daughter's birthday. Informed the staff & during dinner, staff served us desserts with happy birthday message at the end of meal but with food salvaged from the buffet which we just finished! Zero effort! & we can't take just the gift salvaged food the room.
sample_comments.response: Thank you for taking the time to share your review with us. We appreciate your valuable feedback as it helps us identify the areas we can improve the guest experience. We hope you will come back soon in future. Best Regards. Hanaori Frontdesk.

They offer you to wear Yokata all around the place. I enjoyed the open air onsen we had in our room. The dinner was mostly uncooked sea food which was not my favorite, but I found a few selections of veggie options. You will need to get all what you need before arriving to the hotel because its really far from the Yomoto station where you first arrive at Hakone.
sample_comments.response: Thank you for your feedback regarding your stay. We hope that you enjoyed wearing Yukata and the open-air bath as well. sample_comments.text: Its a great locaton with a fantastic view. The cable cart and to the boat is just 2minutes walk too. We both had a small tattoo and you can buy tattoo patches to cover them for 200yen. Breakfast and dinner were very versatile and super tasty. The thing that let down the whole trip is that no one told us about the free complimentary shuttle back to Odawara station that is like 1-2hours on a public bus...like NO ONE. It seems all the locals got on that bus but us as foreigners were left out. When we overheard that there is a bus and asked we been told is completely full.... its a big let down especially with big lagguages when you travel around Japan.

sample_comments.title: A comprehensive place to go!

But the best part is the buffet meal. There's all-you-can-drink alcohol, and the buffet includes items like salmon roe and eel. 
The view from the hotel is nice, and the price is not high either. 
Everything seemed perfect, but there was one issue... 
The garment meant to be worn over the samue in the room had not been washed... 
I was surprised by the curry stains and the horrible smell. 
That is unacceptable. I realized this after having them bring me a different size via the intercom since they didn't have my size, so I didn't mention it before leaving. 
If it weren't for that, it would have been perfect...

sample_comments.title: Secluded retreat
sample_comments.text:
We stayed here with two young kids (2&4) and my mother. Unfortunately we booked a bit late for cherry blossom season so there weren't many good options left - this hotel was recommended in a Reddit thread.

It was my first time in Hakone so I didn't realize how far the hotel is away from the nearest shinkansen station (Odawara). It's a 40 minute drive, and the hotel does offer limited shuttle service but I didn't realize it before nor did they tell me about it. It's about $100 to cab to the hotel via taxi. We did end up taking the free shuttle back to Odawara (there is a 10am and 1pm shuttle), but just be aware.

The location is great if you want a peaceful retreat away from people. It's in a hamlet next to Lake Ashinoko and if our kids hadn't been sick while we were there, we would have done more outdoor exploration. But if you want more touristy things to do, don't stay here because it's at least a 10-15 cab ride anywhere and it's very hard to find a cab - you'd have to book it with the hotel first.

That being said, it's a great place to stay if you just want to relax and hang out in the onsen. We had a good time, and the onsen was never crowded (maybe non Asian people don't like being totally naked in front of others, but there were very few non Asian people in the onsen), and you can also book their private onsen. 

One issue with their service relative to our general experience in Japan is that they have a lot of non-Japanese staff that may be seasonal. The Japanese staff who are permanent are well trained and very polite/thoughtful, but we had a range of experiences with the seasonal/non-Japanese staff. Nothing unpleasant but when you have the gold standard of Japanese service as a contrast, it's quite obvious.

Nevertheless, I would recommend this place if your goal is to stay a few days and relax. Breakfast and dinner are included and the breakfast is very good, better than the dinner. There are lots of families with young kids so it's definitely kid friendly as well.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for staying with Hakone, Ashinoko Hanaori, also we appriciate you for sharing your experience.
Our hotel is far away from the station. thus we provide shuttle service from Odawara Station. 
You can make the booking for our shuttle bus prior to your reservation, so please tell us anytime for your future visit.
As for the other transportation option, you can take the public transportation and if you bought Hakone Free Pass.
You could use the bus, ship, gondola, and all of the transportation in Hakone to go to tourist spots in Hakone. 
Again, thank you for your constructive feedbacks, if you come again in the future please feel free to contact us.
We hope to improve your experience with us in the future.
We will be waiting for your next visit.
Hakone, Ashinoko Hanaori. Accommodation Section.

sample_comments.title: 1st visit to Hakone
sample_comments.text: Hakone town is amazing!!! Need to spend more time there walking around and exploring the good food and lakes around. Time spend going up to hotel by train, cable car was a disaster. Took almost 2 hours to reach the hotel. Last cable car is at 5pm, be careful of your time keeping. Hotel room was amazing, unfortunately it was 2 blocks away from front desk. Our room was with open air bath, luckily, coz both me n my wife has tattoos which was not allowed in public hot spring bath pools. Breakfast and dinner buffet was included, so-so food but dinner amazed me off with Kyoho grapes on the dessert buffet line. Going to Gotemba outlet was easy. New hotel just celebrating 1st anniversary. More anniversaries to come.

sample_comments.title: Nice and modern onsen hotel with great view
sample_comments.text: We stayed in a Japanese/Western room with lake view. Everything was great but strange thing they build the toilet door at the bed area instead of the toilet so it was inconvenient to change yiur clothes if you are staying with someone. Only local tv channels available. Onsen facilities was great. Buffet breakfast and dinner was good but they serve exactly the same dishes for both days. Even the meat and seafood were similar which was pork and fish. I would expect them to rotate e.g seafood one night fish one night prawn/ squid etc. For guests staying more than one night, u get bored with the food by the 2nd day.

sample_comments.title: Lovely - could have stayed longer.
sample_comments.text:
The hotel itself is lovely. Included dinner/breakfast. Dinner was amazing. We read a lot of crazy reviews about the food, but there was so much variety I can't see how you could complain (& I am a pescatarian). We had a normal room but then booked a private onsen after dinner for 40 minutes at 2000yen (20usd) which was well worth it as it meant as a couple we could bathe together.
Calling the hotel beforehand and trying to communicate in English is difficult. The hotel provides a free shuttle bus from Odawara station which saves a lot of trouble - if you can manage to book it. The first time we called we were told it was full. I read other reviews that said this also. However, we rang back within 5 minutes, got a different staff member and got a reservation on the shuttle... not sure why the staff are trained to say this when our shuttle bus had at least 9 more empty seats. 
Another piece of advice - ring and book a dinner time before you arrive. Overall, a lovely hotel :)
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for your feedback regarding your stay.
We're glad to know you had a good time with us.
The reservation of the shuttle changed a lot and we always have same day cancellation, it could be the reason you had a question about it. Anyway we'll try our best on giving equal information.

Thank you for your feedback.

Best regards, Hanaori reception

sample_comments.title: Staff service exceptional, everything else standard
sample_comments.text:
Overall the stay was pleasant. We booked for one night stay with private onsen and dinner and breakfast inclusive. Unfortunately on our checkin day the weather was foggy and rainy, so we couldn't see any views. The lobby was packed with customers and the hotel started allowing us into rooms at 2.30pm (ahead of the official check in time of 3pm) - this was appreciated. 

The public onsen facility was standard in Japan and I wouldn't say anything was exceptional. There were a few customers not observing the onsen protocol of showering before bathing, which made the experience slightly unpleasant. At check in, the staff did ask whether we were familiar with onsen protocol (given we are not Japanese) so I wouldn't discount the effort, but maybe more reminders at onsen facilities in multiple languages? 

Dinner and breakfast was in my honest opinion a bit disappointing, after having been to quite many onsen hotels in Japan. Both meals offer a combination of western and eastern dishes, which unfortunately in my view were not quite authentic. The diversity in food offerings probably added more bad than good in my view to the experience - I'd rather have my typical kaiseki dinner with nabe and etc and breakfast with TKG (they don't serve raw eggs for breakfast! I'm not sure how to enjoy rice without raw eggs for breakfast!). 

The staff was very friendly and helpful and I think this is the best part of the experience. 

Our room with private onsen is on level 1 - I'm not sure if I enjoy being on level 1 as there is literally no view and on a rainy day, being on a lower floor only makes it darker and more gloomy. 

Unlike some of the other reviewers, I think I'd hesitate to return - if you want authentic Japanese onsen ryokan experience I'd recommend somewhere with kaiseiki dinner and sleep on futon on tatami.

We are trying to include our foreign guest and try deter them by giving a diverse selection of food, also we will consider to include other languages for the hotspring notice.
Again thank you for giving us your honest review.
Hakone, Ashinoko Hanaori. Accommodation Section Staff.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.text:
This trip was to express my gratitude to my family, who supported me through my serious illness for eight years. Coincidentally, the permission for the trip was granted in the month of our wedding anniversary, so I decided to stay at Hanawari, recommended by an acquaintance. Since I had to avoid crowds as much as possible, I consulted with the staff before my stay. They provided suggestions to avoid congestion from check-in to breakfast, dinner, and check-out, which gave me peace of mind before arrival. 

The room was a Japanese-Western style DX lakeside room with a balcony and an outdoor bath, and it was clean and very comfortable. Unfortunately, it was raining, so we missed the scenery of Lake Ashi. It is a bit of a walk to the front desk, but it didn't bother me at all. The reception staff were friendly, and the buffet staff were quick and efficient. The other staff members greeted us warmly, which was pleasant. 

Dinner was served in small bowls, making it easy to eat, and the flavors were delicious. However, it would have been better if there were sushi, tempura, hamburgers, or curry, which the kids would enjoy. The dessert was very satisfying. Breakfast included delicious fresh vegetable juice, and the bread and meat and potato stew were tasty. I particularly liked the squid salt-preserve and fermented black soybeans. The pickled plum was quite sour, so I thought it would go well with rice porridge. A fried egg would have been the icing on the cake.

I wasn't able to use the hot spring due to a doctor's restriction, but my wife mentioned that the water was a bit lukewarm, which might not satisfy those who prefer warmer water. Our high school daughter thought the temperature was just right. My wife also stated she would have liked a bit more variety in the amenities. 

It's just a 2-3 minute walk to Tōgendai, so the pirate ship on Lake Ashi and the ropeway at Owakudani weren't much of a hassle even with the intermittent rain, and I appreciated the availability of umbrellas and towels. 

After this stay, I think it would be nice if the hotel had a game center, karaoke, or a bar for fun at night, but I feel it suits families, couples, or those like us who want a quiet and relaxing time. 

One disappointment this time was that we couldn't enjoy the water terrace and foot bath due to the rain, and we couldn't take a walk around Kuzuryu Shrine and Lake Ashi. Since we couldn't do the things we wanted, I hope to be able to return to Hanawari for a second chance next time.
sample_comments.response:

また、ご家族にとって特別なご旅行に当館をお選びいただきましたこと重ねて御礼申し上げます。

sample_comments.title: Location & Onsen Convenience
sample_comments.text: This hotel is a great spot for so many things in Hakone - from the pirate cruise on Lake Ashi to the Ropeway to all parts north. It also has two onsen that are well-maintained and lovely. I reserved a room with a private onsen, and that was amazing. I highly recommend. The dining options near the hotel were limited, and due the large volume of guests, the hotel restaurant was busy and often there was a wait. It was also difficult to schedule taxis without significant planning. Still, a lovely spot - you just need to think about some of the logistics well in advance because some choices are limited due to the remote nature of where you are.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for staying with us at Ashinoko Hanaori in Hakone.
As you mentioned, we are located just a 3-minute walk from the last stop of the train bound for Togendai from Odawara Station, and you can also reach us from Shinjuku by a single bus ride.
In addition, the supply of cabs is not keeping up with the demand for cabs in Hakone, making it very difficult to dispatch cabs on the day of the tour.If you are considering taking a cab, we recommend that you make a reservation in advance.
I know this is a long story, but I am very happy that you enjoyed our hot springs.
We look forward to welcoming you again.

There were however a few small things which prevent it from being a 10/10 stay:
- Rooms are nice but not that luxurious given the cost - probably worth paying the extra for a lake view if you can
- Dinner - the food was great but for a luxury resort the atmosphere did feel a bit like a canteen - this could easily be fixed with some mood lighting, music etc.

sample_comments.title: Pleasant stay, great lake view
sample_comments.text:
Very new and beautifully decorated hotel. Overall a very nice and memorable stay. 

The cons: Onsen a bit small and the view from the outdoor onsen was so-so, no one helped with luggages to the room was unexpected, had to push the trolley from hotel front door to room by going up and down two sets of elevators ourselves (was expecting a hotel of this calibre to send the luggage to the room), breakfast was so-so, no face balm/body lotion in men's onsen restroom was disappointing, no Japanese style landscaped garden with ponds unlike other large Ryokans, the guest survey the hotel ask us to complete only had questions asking what we liked about the hotel, no place to say anything negative or questions on how they can improve, TBH, not very useful for collecting genuine feedbacks. 

The Pros: dinner was great, many varieties, room spacious, corridors and lift lobby very clean and nicely decorated, staff helped departing guests to take photo of the lake and the hotel lobby was nice touch.

sample_comments.title: A beautiful and relaxing hotel with great facilities.
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is very beautiful and well maintained, with a lovely aesthetic and a comfortable room. The surroundings are peaceful and the overall atmosphere feels relaxing and special. We also booked a private onsen, which was an excellent experience: the price was very reasonable and the facilities were beautiful, clean, and very well maintained. On the return trip, we used the hotel shuttle service to the train station, which was excellent and very convenient. The staff was professional and attentive, and the facilities were in very good condition.
sample_comments.negatives:
The hotel is quite remote, and although it offers a shuttle service from the train station, this information was not clearly communicated during the booking process. We arrived by public transport, which was a bit complicated, although the bus does stop right in front of the hotel.
The half-board dining experience is mainly designed for local tastes. While the food quality was fine, there were very limited Western-style options, and most dishes included fish, which could be restrictive for guests who do not eat seafood.

sample_comments.title: For the price - luggage should be transfer to your room & maybe have another onsen for tattoo??
sample_comments.positives: Gorg property and great view.
sample_comments.negatives: Couldn't use public onsen cause of tattoos so had to do the private which was fine but I had to pay extra for that as well and you have to pay for late checkout - shuttle didn't pickup till 3:30- but check out is at 10. Rainy weather so we had to just hang out . Also did luggage transfer- they don't bring your luggage to you're room so that was strange for such a nice hotel

sample_comments.title: Family travel
sample_comments.text: The best resort hotel to enjoy the breathtaking views of Lake Ashi is located within a 5-minute walk from the bus stop. The transportation is very convenient! The check-in process was smooth and without issues. The proud foot bath facility overlooks the entire Lake Ashi, allowing guests to relax easily. The rooms are spacious and very clean! The guest rooms, restaurant, and public areas offer beautiful lake views, and both dinner and breakfast are served buffet-style with a wide variety that is very satisfying. Additionally, the dinner drinks are included in the dinner cost, so no extra charges apply, making it easy to enjoy. As for the bathroom, the open-air bath allows guests to soak while enjoying the view of Lake Ashi, and there are two types of saunas available for me to experience during my stay. The scenery is excellent, the food is delicious, and the bathroom is great. I sincerely hope to stay here again.
sample_comments.response: Thank you for staying at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori. We truly appreciate you for taking time to write such a detailed a valuable review. We are very delighted that you had a great stay with us and enjoyed everything we provided. Please note that our buffet menu and hotel view is changes with seasons. The next time you visit, we are sure that there will be fresh experiences waiting. We look forward to meeting you again! thank you very much for your kind comments and review.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful hotel, could use some improvements to bed comfort
sample_comments.positives: The location is perfect to see all the sights in Hakone, the breakfast and dinner buffets were high quality and diverse, the views from the hotel were beautiful.
sample_comments.negatives: The bathroom really smelled like damp, which impacted our stay. The beds are very uncomfortable with only one (hard) pillow per bed.

sample_comments.title: Must stay. Perfect ending to a Japan trip
sample_comments.text:
I stayed here for two nights at the end of a two week Japan trip and this truly made my trip. So relaxing. Perfectly located. Recommend doing some of the other tourist spots around. Not much to do in town but you don't need any more. Loved the outdoor onsen (pay attention to the signs for which sex goes where. Does stay the same) 

Breakfast and dinner buffets exceptional with all you can drink too. 

Kimonos/kumatas provided in every room and so easy to walk around the hotel wearing them. Very comfortable and everyone gets onboard.
sample_comments.response: Thank you for staying at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori. We truly appreciate you for giving us a full rating of review. We are very delighted that you had a great stay with us and enjoyed everything we provided. Please note that our buffet menu and hotel view is changes with seasons. The next time you visit, we are sure that there will be fresh experiences waiting. We look forward to meeting you again! thank you very much for your kind comments and review.

sample_comments.title: A large luxury style resort, isolated from the action and with so-so food.
sample_comments.positives: This is a luxury style resort with lovely rooms and a nice onsen. Having a buffet breakfast and dinner meant not having to choose a restaurant (nice after a couple weeks in Japan).
sample_comments.negatives: Because the resort has so many guests, it has a busy buffet with mediocre food (some good, some not). The hotel hallways are always playing this same piped in music and there are people everywhere (big resort). It also is very isolated from activities & is a long bus ride from the station (I could not rent a decent bike), so I ended up feeling like I'd made a mistake on this booking. Book this place if you love this style of resort. It wasn't for me (to be fair my husband liked it).

sample_comments.title: Parent-child trip
sample_comments.text: I stayed with my daughter. The room was clean, and the private onsen service was nice. The view of the sunset was beautiful, and the dinner buffet was very luxurious. I found myself wishing I had a bigger appetite.
sample_comments.response:
この度は箱根・芦ノ湖はなをりにご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
ご滞在をお楽しみいただけた様子が伺え、大変嬉しく存じます。
また、温泉やお食事についてお褒めのお言葉をいただけましたこと重ねてお礼申し上げます。
お食事は季節ごとにメニューを変更してご用意しておりますのでまたお越しの際にはその季節ならではのお食事をお楽しみいただけますと幸いです。
またお越しいただけることをスタッフ一同、心よりお待ちしております。

sample_comments.title: It is defeinitly a relaxign place
sample_comments.positives: The view and the calm is out of this world. The hot spring bath in the room is a plus but that gave me a room without the view of the lake. So it is a preference
sample_comments.negatives: The buffet was ok, not too bad and not good either, just meh

sample_comments.title: Clean, excellent buffet , shuttle service
sample_comments.text: The dinner buffet and breakfast were amazing. Their free shuttle service to the main bus terminal was a huge bonus. The place was very clean as well. I'd come back again.
sample_comments.response: Thank you for staying at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori. We truly appreciate you taking the time to write such a detailed review. We are very delighted that you had a great stay with us and enjoyed everything we provided. Please note that our buffet menu and hotel view is changes with seasons. The next time you visit, we are sure that there will be fresh experiences waiting. We look forward to meeting you again! thank you very much for your kind comments and review.
sample_comments.room_type: Casual Twin Room with Open-air Bath

sample_comments.title: Beautiful location and great resort
sample_comments.positives: Room was good with private hot mineral bath on your balcony. Great buffet for breakfast and dinner. Friendly staff. Beautiful location on the lake albeit a bit isolated. Hot springs (onsen) in the hotel quite nice but not many options.
sample_comments.negatives: Location is a bit isolated so no options walkable. But the bus and rope way (cable car) station right next door.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.text: Very good value and the quality is outstanding.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori.
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us.
Our entire staff is committed to continuing to provide services that meet your expectations.
We sincerely look forward to welcoming you again.
Thank you for sharing your review.

sample_comments.title: Lake
sample_comments.positives: Lake view was awesome and love the leg bath onsen
sample_comments.negatives:
The staff did not offer to help unload our luggage on our arrival despite the car park was not near. 
In addition, on our day of departure when it was raining heavily, one of our staff gestured to quickly drive out so as to make space for incoming vehicle at the arrival point.

sample_comments.title: One of the best stay in Japan
sample_comments.text: Great room and meals. Although the variety is almost the same for 2 days. quality is there and the staff is great.
sample_comments.response: Thank you very much for staying with us at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori. We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us. Our entire staff is committed to continuing to provide services that meet your expectations. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you again. Thank you for sharing your review.

sample_comments.title: Very accomodating, peaceful location, great meals!
sample_comments.positives: We had a great time at Hanaori with the kids. It's a bit of a trip from Odawara station, we weren't able to secure a free shuttle to the hotel at a suitable time for us (book early) and the local bus was a bit of a wait so we just caught a taxi. They provide kimonos for all, and advise that you can wear them around the hotel. We weren't able surprised at how many guests were wearing them at meals. Speaking of meals, as the other reviews suggested, was great. Good mix of local and western to keep the kids happy. Nice and close to the lake where we hired paddle boats and also the cable car station to head up. The open air museum is a must! The kids especially loved it. Loved Hakano and Hanaori!
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing. Maybe more snacks in the bar would be appreciated.

sample_comments.title: Perfect Onsen
sample_comments.text:
Incredible service from front desk team helping my mom to get her lost and found item from the hotel to the city by cash on delivery. Thank you for the prompt reply via email, the staff Moe Okuzum is so kind and make me feeling safe!

The concierge boy is helpful too that helping us to use the machine to check out.

Beautiful surroundings, good food and spacious Onsen Pool!

And it is so closed to the Cable Car and Sightseeing Cruise!!! Just a 4 mins walk. 

Highly recommended.
sample_comments.response: Thank you very much for staying with us at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori. Thank you for your highest rating to us! Your feedbacks are important to our improvement forward. Thank you again for choosing our hotel from among many others and for taking the time to write a detailed review. We are very delighted that you had a relaxing stay with us. The view from our hotel changes with the seasons, so we are sure you will enjoy it again on your next visit. We hope you will visit Hananori again when you come to Hakone. We look forward to welcoming you again. Thank you very much for your kind words

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: due to my back pain, I asked us to give a room without bat tub, they did but charged us 150.00 more

sample_comments.title: Memorable experience
sample_comments.text: I had a very good experience. Two small negative things to remark, however: 1) very flaky internet access, 2) occasional strong hydrogen sulfur (rotten egg) smell in the hotel room. 1) can be fixed by hotel; 2) only mother nature to blame, as the hotel is close to active volcanic area which emits H2S naturally. Therefore, for people with strong sensitivity to sulfur, not recommendable.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Hakone Lake Ashi Hanaori.
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay with us.
Thank you for your valuable feedback regarding our internet service. We will share your comments with our staff.
We will continue to strive to provide services that better meet our guests' expectations.
We look forward to welcoming you again.
Thank you for your review.

sample_comments.title: Pretty location, easy access to cable car, food very good to excellent
sample_comments.positives: Peaceful nice onsen , food very good to excellent
sample_comments.negatives:
Wi-Fi not good in rooms

Room very small for family room. Limited room to hang clothes or place auitcases

sample_comments.title: Hakone Ryokan
sample_comments.text: I landed in Haneda, rented a car, and visited a ryokan in Hakone. I reserved a room with an outdoor bath, and the room facilities were clean and nice. However, there was no separate closet, and the room was a bit small, which was somewhat inconvenient. There was also an outlet nearby where I could see Mount Fuji well, so it was nice to shop while enjoying the view of Mount Fuji.
sample_comments.response: Thank you very much for staying at Hakone Ashinoko Hanamori. We are truly delighted to hear that you enjoyed your stay. We are very grateful for your kind words. We will continue to strive to ensure our guests' satisfaction, without becoming complacent due to the praise we have received. Thank you for posting your review. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you again.
sample_comments.room_type: Casual Twin Room with Open-air Bath

sample_comments.title: A nice, clean property that provides good value and will check all the boxes for many people.
sample_comments.positives: The breakfast and dinner buffets were very good. Much better than the standard buffet fare. The view from the lobby was outstanding. Very close to local points of interest.
sample_comments.negatives: The outdoor private hot tub was too small for a 6-foot man and overlooked a parking lot. A long drive from Odawara.

sample_comments.title: Hakone Ashinoko
sample_comments.text: Excellent choice of hotel in terms of location, quality of resort and attentiveness of the staff. Food buffet is excellent. Two points to note, majority of guests take a traditional approach to their attire and wear the Samue Japanese pyjamas provided by the hotel. Also the hotel has a complimentary shuttle service to Hakone Yamoto station, but this needs to be booked in advance.
sample_comments.response: Thank you very much for staying with us at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori. Also, thank you for your feedback regarding our hotel. We will continue to improve our buffet dining and other services so that our guests can enjoy a pleasant stay. Thank you for posting your review. We will be waiting for your next visit.
sample_comments.room_type: Casual Twin Room with Open-air Bath

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives:
Great experience. Beautiful hotel with really nice onsen.
The main issue we had was the internet, it is not working well. The staff were very nice, English level is ok.

sample_comments.title: Good onsen and best dinner
sample_comments.text: Room witg nice view of Hakone lake
sample_comments.response: Thank you for staying at Hakone Ashinoko Hanaori. We truly appreciate you taking time to write such a valuable review. We are delighted that you enjoyed the hotel view and had a good time with us! Please note that our hotel scenery and buffet menu is changes with the seasons. We are pretty that there will be new experiences for your next time. Once again, thank you for your kind comments. We looking forward to meeting you again in the future!

sample_comments.title: Relaxing stay for 1 night in Hakone
sample_comments.positives:
We greatly enjoyed our stay at Ashinoko Hanaori. The lobby and the view it offered were lovely. Our open-air private onsen was absolutely delightful and the view from the room was spectacular.

The beds were a little too soft for me and the overall vibe was rather touristy. The buffet was a little mid, but it did its job well enough. My husband really enjoyed the available sashimi.

sample_comments.title: More than I thought.
sample_comments.text: I visited to celebrate my daughter's birthday. I had ordered a cake, but it was a bit different from what I expected, so that was disappointing. The dinner buffet was very delicious, and having alcohol as a free drink was great. The facility was generally clean, but the restrooms had a slight odor. It would have been nice to have a more pleasant scent. The bath was spacious and very open, and I was able to relax in it. It's convenient to be a 5-minute walk to the pirate ship boarding area. The staff was very friendly, but I was disappointed that a few of the cleaning staff were not smiling or greeting. I have found a place that I would like to visit again to relax.
sample_comments.response:
この度は、箱根・芦ノ湖 はなをり にご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございます。貴重なお時間をいただき、クチコミにご投稿いただきましたこと、厚く御礼申し上げます。今後も、いただきましたご意見を活かし、はなをりのブランドプロミス「花咲くはなをり（会話に花が咲くような心づかい、こまやかな心づかいから、何気なく会話がはずむ、そんな華やぐ時間を演出）」をお客様にお届けできる施設となれるよう努めて参ります。
またお越しいただけることをスタッフ一同お待ちしております。

sample_comments.title: Recommended stay in the Lake Ashi area
sample_comments.positives: Great place to relax for a couple of days between cities. Lovely onsen facilities, men and women switch sides each day to experience each side (slighty different). We traveled as a couple, but it was definitely a family friendly place. Not an issue for us, but that could be a deterrent for others that want a more private experience. We had a room with a private onsen bath which was great to have in addition to the onsens shared by guests. Everything was well stocked, staff was friendly, and the easy access to the ropeway was fantastic. Shuttle coordinated by the hotel was great to get from/to Odawara Station.
sample_comments.negatives: Not too much else to do in the area, but really the point of staying in this area was to be more peaceful anyway. While the buffet style dinner was fantastic in terms of amount of options and great tasting flavors, if you were staying here for 2+ days, the options could get quite repetitive.

sample_comments.title: I recommend it.
sample_comments.text: I used it for the first time on a family memorial trip. On the day when heavy snow caused the Tomei Expressway to be closed, we somehow managed to arrive, but when I called the front desk that morning, they told me that free cancellations and date changes were possible, which made me feel relieved. It might have been due to the heavy snow, but there weren't too many guests at the hotel, so we were able to enjoy both the large communal bath and the meals. The dinner and breakfast buffets were wonderful, with everything tasting great. There was also all-you-can-drink alcoholic beverages, which made my family very happy. For someone like me who struggles with hot baths at day-use hot spring facilities, the temperature setting was perfect and allowed me to relax. Thanks to the heavy snow, we got to enjoy a snowy bath. The only unfortunate thing was that the sofa that looked like it was in the water basin outside the lobby was not usable. As shown in the pictures, although it couldn't be helped on the day of the heavy snow, the weather was nice and the temperature went up the next day, so I thought they could have cleared the snow from it. Therefore, I have to give the service a minus one.
sample_comments.response: この度は、箱根・芦ノ湖 はなをりにご宿泊いただきまして誠にありがとうございます。貴重なお時間をいただき、詳細にレビューを記載していただきましたこと重ねて御礼申し上げます。　ご滞在中、ごゆっくりお過ごしいただけた様子が伺え私共も大変嬉しく存じます。箱根の名湯と芦ノ湖の雄大な眺望とのコラボレーションが望める温泉や、旬の食材を使用した料理を堪能していただけたら幸いでございます。当館のビュッフェのメニューは季節に応じて変わってまいりますので、次回のご来館もきっとお楽しみいただけるかと思います。またのご来館をスタッフ一同心よりお待ち申し上げております。ご投稿ありがとうございました。

sample_comments.title: Fantastic for travellers
sample_comments.text:
We opted for the open air bath and it was fantastic. While the room is relatively small, I understand this is more for staycay kind so people usually pack light. The location of the accoms was great too. A stone throw away from Togendai ropeway and pirate ship. The dedicated bus that brings us to and fro Odawara station to the accoms was great too. We didnt drive so, I cant imagine how we gonna carry our bulky luggages to get there. Once you enter, you are greeted by the staffs and with great view and foot baths. 
Dinner and breakfast were a bit repetitive for our 3 days long stay. Otherwise still great.
sample_comments.response:
Thank you for staying at Hakone Lake Ashi Hanaori.
We are very pleased to hear that you enjoyed your stay.
We hope that you will enjoy the magnificent views of Lake Ashi, which change with the seasons, and our seasonal meals made with seasonal ingredients when you visit again.
Thank you for your review.
All of our staff look forward to welcoming you again.
sample_comments.room_type: Casual Twin Room with Open-air Bath

sample_comments.title: It was convenient for the boat ride and the Ropeway! The family enjoyed the baths!
sample_comments.positives: Location was outstanding! Dinner was outstanding! Breakfast was very good. Rooms were very comfortable! Onsen was great!
sample_comments.negatives: Everything was OK.

sample_comments.title: Mother's birthday trip
sample_comments.text: I made a reservation because it had high ratings and looked good when I searched around Hakone. The room and common areas were very clean, and I was able to spend a very comfortable time there. The meals were plentiful in variety, and my mother was also pleased. However, one downside is that the layout of the building is complex, and I think those who are directionally challenged may get lost. My room was far from the elevator, so moving around was a hassle. I would appreciate it if you could improve things by providing more guidance within the building. The shuttle bus from Odawara Station was also helpful. I would like to stay again if I have the opportunity.
sample_comments.response: この度は、箱根・芦ノ湖 はなをりにご宿泊いただきましてありがとうございます。お部屋や共用部の清掃、お食事にご満足いただけたとのこと、大変嬉しく拝読いたしました。一方で、館内の構造やお部屋の位置についてご不便をおかけし申し訳ございません。いただいたご意見は今後の改善に活かしてまいります。送迎バスもご利用いただき、ご好評いただけたこと、安心いたしました。今後も皆様の期待にお応えできるサービスを提供できるようスタッフ一同精進してまいります。

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: public and private onsen options, the view over the lake
sample_comments.negatives: food options and the dining hall vibe

sample_comments.title: A wonderful stay
sample_comments.text:
My daughter (15) and I really enjoyed our stay. We were in a twin room with outside bath which provided just enough room for the two of us. We travelled with just a backpack as we only stayed 2 nights but it would have been a tight squeeze if we had brought our medium sized suitcases. The bath on the balcony was lovely and hot and full at all times (the water replenishes when you step out of the bath). The onsen was amazing. Three indoor pools and an outside one plus a steam room. It was a real treat each night to go and use the onsen before bed. There are also massage chairs before you enter the onsen but these were not a gentle massage, more of a firm, deep massage. The location was perfect. Beautiful views across the lake and minuets from buses and the ropeway plus private ships. If you start the 'loop' using the ropeway before 10am you'll be rewarded with very few people on the transport (everyone is going in the opposite direction). 

Whilst the food was plentiful and we really enjoyed trying everything, I do think there could have been more Japanese food .
sample_comments.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Hakone Ashinoko Hanatori.
We are delighted that you had a comfortable stay.
We were delighted to see that you thoroughly enjoyed your Hakone trip at our inn, including the baths and meals.
Regarding our dining experience, we will strive to improve based on your valuable feedback so that you may fully savor the charm of Japan.
All of our staff will continue to strive to provide an even more comfortable space.
We look forward to seeing you again. Thank you for your review.
sample_comments.room_type: Casual Twin Room with Open-air Bath

sample_comments.title: Nice way to end a three week trip through Japan
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful view from our room. Private bath at a reasonable price. Beautiful kimonos. Staff was super helpful.
sample_comments.negatives: Too many slippers. Perhaps making the hotel a ryokan would be better. Room temperature way too hot.

sample_comments.title: Relaxing retreat
sample_comments.text: Hotel offers a stunning view of the surrounding landscape, making it a perfect getaway. The cleanliness is top notch and the staff goes above and beyond to ensure pleasant experiences. Facilities are impressive providing onsen with multiple pools. The dinner and breakfast buffet are fantastic too.
sample_comments.response:
この度は再度「箱根・芦ノ湖 はなをり」にご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございます。貴重なお時間をいただき、クチコミにご投稿いただきましたこと、厚く御礼申し上げます。
今後、いただいた評価に甘んじることなくはなをりのブランドプロミス「花咲くはなをり（会話に花が咲くような心づかい、こまやかな心づかいから、何気なく会話がはずむ、そんな華やぐ時間を演出）」をお客様にお届けできる施設となれるよう努めて参ります。
